description: Royal blue canvas tote with a bold, full-color toucan and tropical floral print on the front panel and solid blue canvas on the back.
Mustard-yellow African wax-print shoulder bag featuring stylized peacock-feather motifs in black and magenta, with solid black canvas on the reverse.
Natural-canvas tote accented by a horizontal zebra block-print panel framed in black trim, blending safari style with neutral tones.
Deep navy canvas shopper highlighted by a vibrant toucan and tropical bloom print inset, creating a striking contrast of dark and color-rich elements.
